THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLEMAN, EDDIE J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 387 ELLIS STREET #315, S.F. $1,385.89 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,385.89, STAYED UNTIL FEB-12-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 5PM. IF THE DEFT COMPLETES TIMELY PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT, THEN THE JUDGMENT IS DEEMED SATISFIED AND HIS TENANCY IS REINSTATED.
